summary: Iteration 113: Tested 3 new features - Daily Summary Net Columns, Duplicate Prevention, and Guided Tours for ~14 remaining sub-modules. All 10 backend tests passed. All UI features verified working.
seed_data_creation: Added 2 test sales during testing (SAR 500 and SAR 800 on March 2026 dates)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 113 verified all 3 requested features working correctly.

1_daily_summary_net_columns_backend.details: GET /api/dashboard/daily-summary-range returns net_cash and net_bank in each daily row and in totals. Verified calculation: net_cash = sales_cash - exp_cash, totals.net_cash = sales_cash - exp_cash - sp_cash

2_daily_summary_net_columns_frontend.details: Daily Summary page in Date Range + Day by Day mode shows 'Net Cash' and 'Net Bank' columns (headers found: ['Date', 'Sales', 'Cash', 'Bank', 'Expenses', 'Cash', 'Bank', 'SP', 'Net Cash', 'Net Bank', 'Net']). Data shows: Totals net_cash=-625.00, net_bank=-24,000.00. Negative values displayed in red (35 cells with red styling found)

3_duplicate_prevention_backend.details: GET /api/sales/check-duplicate?branch_id=X&amount=Y&date=Z returns {has_duplicate: bool, count: int}. Correctly identifies existing sales with same branch+amount on same date (tolerance 0.01)

4_duplicate_prevention_frontend.details: Sales page shows duplicate detection: 6 duplicate warning badges found on day rows (Feb 27, 28, etc.). Days with duplicates have orange background and 'Duplicate' badge with AlertTriangle icon. AlertDialog component at data-testid='duplicate-warning-dialog' configured with Cancel and 'Yes, Save Anyway' buttons

5_guided_tours_module_configuration.details: ModuleTour.jsx has MODULE_TOURS configured for 32 routes including all 14 requested sub-modules: platform-reconciliation, monthly-recon-report, bank-accounts, branches, cctv, documents, fines, partners, company-loans, schedule, transfers, bank-statements, credit-report, supplier-report, category-report, reconciliation

6_guided_tours_platform_reconciliation.details: Platform Reconciliation tour has 4 steps: 1) Platform Reconciliation - 'Track payments from delivery platforms (HungerStation, Keeta, etc.) vs your actual online sales', 2) Auto Fee Calculator, 3) Fee Settings, 4) Monthly Report - 'Click Monthly Report to see month-by-month breakdown'. Tour shows with Skip, Back, Next buttons and progress indicator (Step X of 4)

screenshots.daily_summary_net_columns: Shows Day by Day table with Net Cash and Net Bank columns, negative values in red (SAR -625.00, SAR -24,000.00)
screenshots.sales_duplicate_badges: Shows Sales page with orange 'Duplicate' badges on Feb 27 and Feb 28 rows
screenshots.platform_recon_tour_step1: Shows Platform Reconciliation tour Step 1 of 4 with description about tracking delivery platform payments
screenshots.platform_recon_tour_step4: Shows Monthly Report step (Step 4 of 4) with 'Got it!' button
